Subtotal:{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.total - doc.tax_amount|default(0), currency=doc.currency) }}

VAT ({{ doc.tax_rate or 15 }}%):{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.tax_amount or 0, currency=doc.currency) }}

Paid:{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.paid_amount, currency=doc.currency) }}
Balance Due:{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.balance or doc.total - doc.paid_amount, currency=doc.currency) }}
